reference: Good evening. I recently had the removal of basal cell carcinoma from my right shoulder. I had internal and external sutures. The scar is painful and raised, and I have stabbing pain intermittently. I now have a painful lump at the base of my skull that is making it hard to sleep. Could this be a swollen lymph node caused by the basal cell removal?
text: Good evening. I recently had the removal of a basal cell carcinoma from my right shoulder. I had internal and external seizures. The scars painful and raised, and I had stabbing pain in my hands. I now have a painful lump at the base of my shoulder that is making it hard to sleep. Could this be a shoulder injury caused by the basal cell in my arm?
